Azure.Core.azureLocation.description: Represents an Azure geography region where supported resource providers live.

instanceCount.description: Total number of instances across all partitions.

instanceCount.description: Number of instances in this partition.

CapacityRegionOverride.description: Capacity override for a specific region.

values.name: Accepted
values.description: The resource creation request has been accepted.

ipTagValue.description: The IP tag value for egress.

ipVersion.description: The IP version (IPv4 or IPv6). Defaults to IPv4.

Environment.description: An Environment resource representing a per-ring deployment environment within a namespace.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

EnvironmentListResult.description: The response of a Environment list operation.

value.description: The Environment items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

resourcePolicy.description: Resource policy configuration for the environment.

networking.description: Networking configuration for the environment including BYOIP and SNAT settings.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the environment resource.

conditions.description: Status conditions reporting errors or important state transitions.

expectedCompletionTime.description: The expected completion time for an in-progress operation.

statusDescription.description: A human-readable description of the current environment status.

EnvironmentUpdate.description: The type used for update operations of the Environment.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

EnvironmentUpdateProperties.description: The updatable properties of the Environment.

resourcePolicy.description: Resource policy configuration for the environment.

networking.description: Networking configuration for the environment including BYOIP and SNAT settings.

HealthState.description: The health state of an environment resource.

IngressPublicIpConfiguration.description: Ingress public IP configuration using BYOIP.

ipTagType.description: The IP tag type for ingress.

ipTagValue.description: The IP tag value for ingress.

names.description: Names associated with this ingress IP configuration.

ipVersion.description: The IP version (IPv4 or IPv6). Defaults to IPv4.

prefixLength.description: The prefix length for the public IP.

ipVersion.description: The IP version (IPv4 or IPv6). Defaults to IPv4.

InstanceRealization.description: Realization details for a specific instance.

partition.description: The partition this instance belongs to.

clusterResourceId.description: The ARM resource ID of the cluster backing this instance.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of this instance.

migrationState.description: The current migration state of this instance.

MigrationState.description: The migration state of a namespace instance.

values.name: NeedsMigration
values.description: Instance spec and cluster spec are mismatched; migration is required but has not started.

values.name: InMigration
values.description: The instance is currently being migrated.

values.name: NoMigrationNeeded
values.description: The instance is correctly placed; no migration is required.

Namespace.description: A Namespace resource representing a logical grouping of Cosmic environments.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

NamespaceListResult.description: The response of a Namespace list operation.

value.description: The Namespace items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

workload.description: Workload name this resource belongs to.

serviceTreeId.description: The ServiceTree GUID (with all letters in lower case) for billing

isolationGroup.description: The isolation group for this namespace.

nightwatchEnabled.description: Indicates whether Nightwatch monitoring is enabled for the namespace.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the namespace resource.

NamespaceUpdate.description: The type used for update operations of the Namespace.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

NamespaceUpdateProperties.description: The updatable properties of the Namespace.

serviceTreeId.description: The ServiceTree GUID (with all letters in lower case) for billing

isolationGroup.description: The isolation group for this namespace.

nightwatchEnabled.description: Indicates whether Nightwatch monitoring is enabled for the namespace.

ingressPublicIps.description: BYOIP (Bring Your Own IP) tags for ingress traffic.

egressPublicIps.description: BYOIP (Bring Your Own IP) configuration for egress traffic.

snatPortsPerNode.description: Optional SNAT ports to allocate per node. Empty or unset means not specified.

OsType.description: The operating system type for the compute nodes.

PartitionRealization.description: Realization details for a specific partition.

realizationState.description: The realization state of this partition.

PodResourceSpec.description: Resource specification for a single service pod.

coresLimit.description: CPU cores limit per pod. If unset, defaults to approximately 2x the request.

memoryLimit.description: Memory limit per pod. If unset, defaults to approximately 2x the request.

rollingUpdateReplicaPercentage.description: Percentage of replicas considered during rolling updates (default: 10).

RealizationState.description: The realization state of an environment resource.

RegionRealization.description: Realization details for a specific region.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of this realization.

healthState.description: The health state of this realization.

RegionalResourcePolicy.description: Resource policy override for a specific region.

resourcePolicy.description: Default resource policy for all rings.

osType.description: The operating system type (e.g. Linux, Windows).

gpuDriverType.description: The GPU driver type (e.g. CUDA, GRID).

ResourcePolicyConfiguration.description: Resource policy configuration for the environment.

resourcePolicy.description: Default resource policy for all rings.

StatusCondition.description: A condition reporting detailed status information.

type.description: The type of condition (e.g. InMigration, PlacementAbandoned).

conditionStatus.description: The status of the condition: True, False, or Unknown.

reason.description: A one-word CamelCase reason for the condition's last transition.

message.description: A human-readable message with details about the last transition.

lastHeartbeatTime.description: The last time an update was received for this condition.

lastTransitionTime.description: The last time this condition transitioned from one status to another.

regions.description: The Azure regions where instances should be placed (e.g. ['eastus', 'westus']).
